title_variants: Central flat with free parking - ideal for 4 guests! (£146/nt)
£146/nt: Peaceful central flat with free parking
Stay in style: Peaceful central flat with free parking (£146/nt)
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to our charming Peaceful central flat with free parking! Perfect for 4 guests, this entire home offers a comfortable retreat in the heart of the city. Enjoy your stay in a secure building with designated free parking. Whether you're here for the nearby attractions or just looking for a relaxing break, our flat is the perfect base for you. We've taken great care to ensure our home is clean, comfortable, and well-equipped for your needs. Please note that we're not a superhost, but we strive to provide the best possible experience for our guests. We're looking forward to hosting you soon!
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space for fresh air and relaxation
Access to facilities such as laundry and Wi-Fi
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room should be the cover photo as it showcases the best features of the flat, including its size and comfort.
key_diagnosis: With a nightly rate £29 below the median £175 in the same market, consider revising your pricing strategy to remain competitive.

Despite having only 17 reviews, the 4.71 rating suggests that guests are highly satisfied with their stay - a great basis to build on, especially considering your occupancy is 20.7% booked over the next 90 days, significantly lower than the median 28.3% across your cohort.

Given the high demand for a flat with free parking in central London (£146/nt), your occupancy is a major missed opportunity at 20.7% booked over the next 90 days - that's 71 open nights for you to attract more guests
analysis.outreach_hook: With 71 open nights over the next 90 days and an occupancy rate of 20.7%, there's a significant gap between your demand and bookings - let's discuss how to enhance the offering to attract more guests.
